body_txt: A practice where video footage is subjected to Redubbing with rewritten or ad-libbed dialogue, usually for comedic purposes. There are a few reasons to do this with a licensed property. If a company technically owns the property of a show that isn't seen as viable, such as the jokes being too culturally specific, they can make something creative with it. In more pandering fashion, producers are cashing in on a fad by buying an older show and retooling it. In rare cases, sometimes you just never get a hold of decent original scripts. Other gag dubs are in no way licensed or official, just fan-made parodies; see The Abridged Series for a popular form of that. Gag Sub is the equivalent for subtitles, Remix Comic for comic books and manga, and some Literal Music Videos . May overlap with Hong Kong Dub . See also Animutation , Détournement , YouTube Poop , and Woolseyism .          Gag dubs without pages   Gag dubs without pages
